observe: Full frames mean something has to leave before something new arrives. FIFO just picks whoever's been here longest — no judgment involved.
fault: You just evicted a page you needed again a moment later. FIFO doesn't know that — it only knows arrival order.
repair: Track the arrival order. Watch what leaves and what should have stayed.
escape: No time to reconsider the eviction. FIFO doesn't look back — neither can you.

observe: FIFO page replacement evicts the page that has been resident longest.
fault: A page was evicted and immediately needed again.
repair: Trace the FIFO eviction order across the frame set.
escape: Confirm the FIFO replacement sequence completes.

hints: FIFO only tracks arrival order, not how recently or often a page was used.
